title: malva subacaulis
intro: Malva subacaulis, also known as mallow, is a perennial herb belonging to the family Malvaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Malva subacaulis include soothing digestive issues, reducing inflammation and pain, and supporting the immune system. Malva subacaulis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and it can also be used as a topical cream or ointment to aid in wound healing and skin issues.
